import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Find yellow pyramid on the grid
    pyramid_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    pyramid_count = jnp.sum(pyramid_mask)
    pyramid_y = jnp.sum(yy * pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(pyramid_count, 1)
    pyramid_x = jnp.sum(xx * pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(pyramid_count, 1)

    # Find green square on the grid
    square_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    square_count = jnp.sum(square_mask)
    square_y = jnp.sum(yy * square_mask) / jnp.maximum(square_count, 1)
    square_x = jnp.sum(xx * square_mask) / jnp.maximum(square_count, 1)

    agent_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Check if agent is holding the yellow pyramid
    holding_pyramid = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_pyramid_f = holding_pyramid.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Distance from agent to yellow pyramid (when not holding)
    dist_agent_to_pyramid = jnp.abs(agent_y - pyramid_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - pyramid_x)

    # Distance from agent to green square (when holding)
    dist_agent_to_square = jnp.abs(agent_y - square_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - square_x)

    # Distance from yellow pyramid to green square (when placed)
    dist_pyramid_to_square = jnp.abs(pyramid_y - square_y) + jnp.abs(pyramid_x - square_x)

    # Normalize distances by grid size
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Success: yellow pyramid is adjacent to green square (manhattan distance == 1)
    # This means pyramid is on the grid (not held) and next to the square
    pyramid_on_grid = pyramid_count > 0
    pyramid_adjacent = (dist_pyramid_to_square <= 1.5) & pyramid_on_grid  # <=1 manhattan
    pyramid_adjacent_f = pyramid_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Milestone 1: reward for picking up the yellow pyramid
    pickup_reward = holding_pyramid_f * 0.3

    # Milestone 2: when holding pyramid, reward for being close to green square
    # Normalized: 0 when far, up to 0.3 when adjacent
    dist_to_square_norm = dist_agent_to_square / max_dist
    approach_square_reward = holding_pyramid_f * (1.0 - dist_to_square_norm) * 0.3

    # Milestone 3: when not holding, reward for being close to yellow pyramid
    not_holding = 1.0 - holding_pyramid_f
    dist_to_pyramid_norm = dist_agent_to_pyramid / max_dist
    approach_pyramid_reward = not_holding * (1.0 - dist_to_pyramid_norm) * 0.1

    # Success reward: pyramid placed adjacent to square
    success_reward = pyramid_adjacent_f * 1.0

    total_reward = (
        approach_pyramid_reward
        + pickup_reward
        + approach_square_reward
        + success_reward
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
